description: Shared FE<->BE SQL Safe Mode severity parity fixture. Consumed by both vitest (src/lib/sql/sqlSafety.parity-fixture.test.ts, `analyzeStatement(sql, {dialect}).severity`) and cargo test (src-tauri/sql-parser-core/src/safety.rs `classifier_parity_fixture`, `classify_with_dialect(sql, hash)`). Replaces the hand-copied 'Parity mirror' block so a classifier change on one side that drifts the other trips a test. Only cases whose FE regex-fallback (jsdom, no WASM) equals the BE native parse are listed here; EXPLAIN inner-inheritance and `ALTER … DROP INDEX` depend on the WASM AST and diverge in the vitest jsdom env, so they stay in each side's own unit tests. Issue #1450 added an optional per-case `dialect` field (MySQL/MariaDB enable `#` line-comment stripping); absent means dialect-agnostic.

cases.name: read_select
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users

cases.name: explain_select
cases.sql: EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM users

cases.name: insert
cases.sql: INSERT INTO users (id) VALUES (1)

cases.name: create_table
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE t (id int)

cases.name: update_where
cases.sql: UPDATE users SET active = false WHERE id = 1

cases.name: delete_where
cases.sql: DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1

cases.name: grant
cases.sql: GRANT SELECT ON users TO bob

cases.name: revoke
cases.sql: REVOKE SELECT ON users FROM bob

cases.name: alter_add_column
cases.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN age integer

cases.name: alter_rename_table
cases.sql: ALTER TABLE users RENAME TO people

cases.name: update_no_where
cases.sql: UPDATE users SET active = false

cases.name: delete_no_where
cases.sql: DELETE FROM users

cases.name: truncate
cases.sql: TRUNCATE users

cases.name: replace_into
cases.sql: REPLACE INTO users VALUES (1)

cases.name: restore_database
cases.sql: RESTORE DATABASE shop FROM DISK = 'x.bak'

cases.name: alter_drop_column
cases.sql: ALTER TABLE orders DROP COLUMN email

cases.name: alter_drop_constraint
cases.sql: ALTER TABLE orders DROP CONSTRAINT fk_user

cases.name: drop_table
cases.sql: DROP TABLE users

cases.name: drop_database
cases.sql: DROP DATABASE app

cases.name: drop_schema
cases.sql: DROP SCHEMA s

cases.name: drop_index
cases.sql: DROP INDEX i

cases.name: drop_view
cases.sql: DROP VIEW v

cases.name: drop_trigger
cases.sql: DROP TRIGGER t ON users

cases.name: drop_function_warn
cases.sql: DROP FUNCTION f()

cases.name: drop_procedure_warn
cases.sql: DROP PROCEDURE p

cases.name: drop_role_warn
cases.sql: DROP ROLE r

cases.name: drop_extension_warn
cases.sql: DROP EXTENSION postgis

cases.name: drop_materialized_view_warn
cases.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW mv

cases.name: cte_update_where
cases.sql: WITH x AS (UPDATE users SET active = false WHERE id = 1 RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM x

cases.name: cte_delete_where
cases.sql: WITH x AS (DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1 RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM x

cases.name: cte_delete_no_where
cases.sql: WITH x AS (DELETE FROM users RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM x

cases.name: cte_update_no_where
cases.sql: WITH x AS (UPDATE users SET active = false RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM x

cases.name: cte_insert
cases.sql: WITH x AS (INSERT INTO users (id) VALUES (1) RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM x

cases.name: cte_pure_read
cases.sql: WITH x AS (SELECT 1 AS n) SELECT n FROM x

cases.name: cte_recursive_delete
cases.sql: WITH RECURSIVE x (id) AS (DELETE FROM users RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM x

cases.name: mcte_2nd_delete_no_where
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (DELETE FROM users) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_2nd_update_no_where
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (UPDATE users SET active = false) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_middle_delete
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (DELETE FROM users), c AS (SELECT 2) SELECT * FROM c

cases.name: mcte_2nd_truncate
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (TRUNCATE users) SELECT * FROM a

cases.name: mcte_nested_subquery_read
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT (SELECT 1)), b AS (DELETE FROM users) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_bounded_delete_where
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (DELETE FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM stale)) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_delete_in_string
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 'DELETE FROM users' AS note), b AS (SELECT 2) SELECT * FROM a

cases.name: mcte_2nd_insert
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (INSERT INTO users (id) VALUES (1) RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM a

cases.name: mcte_open_paren_string
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT '(' ), b AS (DELETE FROM users) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_open_paren_dollar
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT $$($$), b AS (DELETE FROM users) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_open_paren_quoted_ident
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1 AS "x("), b AS (DELETE FROM users) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_open_paren_on_body
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (UPDATE users SET note = '(') SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_close_paren_string
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT ')' ), b AS (DELETE FROM users) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: mcte_close_paren_dollar
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT $$)$$), b AS (DELETE FROM users) SELECT * FROM b

cases.name: multi_trailing_drop
cases.sql: SELECT 1; DROP TABLE users

cases.name: multi_semicolon_in_string
cases.sql: SELECT ';DROP TABLE users' AS note

cases.name: commented_danger_keyword
cases.sql: /* DROP TABLE users */ SELECT 1

cases.name: nested_block_comment_drop
cases.sql: /* outer /* inner */ still-outer */ DROP TABLE users

cases.name: nested_block_comment_3level
cases.sql: /* a /* b /* c */ d */ e */ DROP TABLE users

cases.name: block_comment_open_in_string_read
cases.sql: SELECT '/* not a comment */' AS note

cases.name: unbalanced_open_comment_drop_mysql
cases.sql: /* /* */ DROP TABLE t

cases.name: unbalanced_open_comment_drop_sqlite
cases.sql: /* /* */ DROP TABLE t

cases.name: unbalanced_open_comment_drop_oracle
cases.sql: /* /* */ DROP TABLE t

cases.name: unbalanced_open_comment_drop_agnostic
cases.sql: /* /* */ DROP TABLE t

cases.name: unbalanced_open_comment_postgres_consumed
cases.sql: /* /* */ DROP TABLE t

cases.name: backslash_literal_unbounded_update_mysql
cases.sql: UPDATE accounts SET note='a\' WHERE id=1'

cases.name: hash_comment_drop_mysql
cases.sql:
#x
DROP TABLE users

cases.name: hash_comments_out_drop_mysql
cases.sql:
#DROP TABLE users
SELECT 1

cases.name: hash_in_string_mysql
cases.sql: SELECT 'a # b' AS note

cases.name: hash_not_a_comment_without_mysql
cases.sql:
#x
DROP TABLE users

cases.name: literal_where_unbounded_update
cases.sql: UPDATE accounts SET balance=balance+1, note='ask WHERE money'

cases.name: literal_where_escaped_quote_update
cases.sql: UPDATE accounts SET note='it''s ok WHERE now'

cases.name: literal_where_bounded_still_warn
cases.sql: UPDATE users SET note='reset WHERE flag' WHERE id = 1
